mapper.select: SELECT B_ID as bId, B_CATEGORY as bCategory, B_CC as bCc, B_TITLE as bTitle, B_CONTENT as bContent, B_CREATED_ID as bCreatedId, B_CREATED_DATE as bCreatedDate, B_UPDATED_ID as bUpdatedId, B_UPDATED_DATE as bUpdatedDate, B_VIEWS as bViews FROM BOARD ORDER BY B_ID DESC

SELECT B_ID as bId, B_CATEGORY as bCategory, B_CC as bCc, B_TITLE as bTitle, B_CONTENT as bContent, B_CREATED_ID as bCreatedId, B_CREATED_DATE as bCreatedDate, B_UPDATED_ID as bUpdatedId, B_UPDATED_DATE as bUpdatedDate, B_VIEWS as bViews FROM BOARD WHERE
B_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
B_CATEGORY LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
B_CC LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
B_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
B_CREATED_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY B_CREATED_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD ( B_CATEGORY as bCategory, B_CC as bCc, B_TITLE as bTitle, B_CONTENT as bContent, B_CREATED_ID as bCreatedId, B_CREATED_DATE as bCreatedDate, B_VIEWS as bViews ) VALUES ( #{B_CATEGORY}, #{B_CC}, #{B_TITLE}, #{B_CONTENT}, #{B_CREATED_ID}, SYSDATE, #{B_VIEWS})
